JUDGE WICK, BETH WILBER - CLERK, PATTY DOWLING - REPORTER: C/C FOR JURY TRIAL, ALL PARTIES PRESENT, CASE SETTLED, JUDGMENT SUBMITTED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JONES, CANDY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 140 TURK ST, #18, STAYED UNTIL FEB-02-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, WRIT MAY ISSUE, BUT NO EVICTION UNTIL AFTER 5PM, 2/2/95; IF DEFT. COMPLIES WITH AGREEMENT AND TURNS OVER KEYS TO PLTF, THE DEFT. MAY HAVE THE JUDGMENT DEEMED SATISFIED IN FULL; (SEE FILE FOR DETAILS).
